name: Nachynka z Kapusty (Cabbage Filling for Varenyky)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Oil, OR 1/4 lb Butter (1 stick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour off the sauerkraut juice and reserve it.
2. Chop the reserved juice and set aside.
3. Saute the onions in oil or butter until golden brown.
4. Add the drained, chopped sauerkraut, cabbage, bouillon cube, and reserved sauerkraut juice to the sauteed onions.
5. Cook over low heat, uncovered, stirring often until all liquid evaporates.
6. Add freshly ground black pepper, stir to combine, and allow to cool.
7. Chop or grind the mixture once more in a food processor or meat grinder.
